name: Kotak Privy League Signature Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 8X Reward Points on travel and dining spends
4 Reward Points per ₹150 on all other purchases

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹25,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Priority Pass membership for lounge access
Golf privileges at select courses (4 rounds/year)
pros: Excellent lounge access with 12 domestic + 4 international visits
8X rewards on travel and dining is competitive
cons: Point value at ₹0.25 is below average for this tier
₹5,000 annual fee requires significant spend to justify
Requires Privy League banking relationship for best experience
idealFor: Kotak Privy League customers looking for premium card benefits
Frequent travellers who need strong lounge access

faqs.question: Do I need a Privy League account?
faqs.answer: While not mandatory, having a Kotak Privy League savings account enhances the card benefits and may improve approval chances. The card is primarily offered to Privy League banking customers.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits are included?
faqs.answer: You get 12 complimentary domestic and 4 international lounge visits per year through Priority Pass and Dreamfolks.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹5,000 annual fee is waived on spending ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year.
